news.title:
Devyani Int'l CEO of Yum Brands resigns, effective Feb 28, 2026.
Resignation dated Nov 24, 2025; transition support offered by CEO.
news.summary:
Devyani Int'l CEO of Yum Brands resigns, effective Feb 28, 2026.
Resignation dated Nov 24, 2025; transition support offered by CEO.

news.title:
Devyani International added 54 KFC, 18 Pizza Hut stores, totaling 2279 outlets.
Revenue rose 11.3% YoY to INR 1441 crore; new CEO, CFO announced pre-merger.
news.summary:
Devyani International added 54 KFC, 18 Pizza Hut stores, totaling 2279 outlets.
Revenue rose 11.3% YoY to INR 1441 crore; new CEO, CFO announced pre-merger.

news.title:
Private equity investors increase bets on India's F&B sector due to changing consumption and rising discretionary spending.
The surge in deals reflects confidence in the sector's scalability, consolidation, and long-term value creation.
news.summary:
Private equity investors increase bets on India's F&B sector due to changing consumption and rising discretionary spending.
The surge in deals reflects confidence in the sector's scalability, consolidation, and long-term value creation.

news.title: Bernstein gives an outperform rating to Devyani Intl with a target of ₹160/sh.
news.summary: Bernstein gives an outperform rating to Devyani Intl with a target of ₹160/sh.

news.title:
Nuvama maintains Buy rating for Devyani International, revising target to ₹185.
The new target is reduced from the earlier ₹216.
news.summary:
Nuvama maintains Buy rating for Devyani International, revising target to ₹185.
The new target is reduced from the earlier ₹216.

news.title:
Jefferies upgrades Devyani International to Buy with a target of ₹145.
Sapphire merger may cause short-term volatility but boosts long-term scale.
news.summary:
Jefferies upgrades Devyani International to Buy with a target of ₹145.
Sapphire merger may cause short-term volatility but boosts long-term scale.

news.title:
Devyani International appoints CFO Manish Dawar as President and CEO ahead of Sapphire merger.
The QSR major prepares for significant transformation with leadership change.
news.summary:
Devyani International appoints CFO Manish Dawar as President and CEO ahead of Sapphire merger.
The QSR major prepares for significant transformation with leadership change.

news.title:
Devyani International plans a Pizza Hut reset under new CEO Manish Dawar, focusing on shutting loss-making stores and technology upgrades.
Merger with Sapphire Foods aims to enhance efficiencies; Devyani's shares surged 6% to ₹123.3 on BSE amidst positive market reaction.
news.summary:
Devyani International plans a Pizza Hut reset under new CEO Manish Dawar, focusing on shutting loss-making stores and technology upgrades.
Merger with Sapphire Foods aims to enhance efficiencies; Devyani's shares surged 6% to ₹123.3 on BSE amidst positive market reaction.

news.title: Devyani International plans strategic merger and expansion to 3,000+ global stores.
news.summary: Devyani International plans strategic merger and expansion to 3,000+ global stores.

news.title:
Devyani International focuses on turning around Pizza Hut by shutting loss-making stores.
Management confirms no new Pizza Hut stores except to replace closed outlets.
news.summary:
Devyani International focuses on turning around Pizza Hut by shutting loss-making stores.
Management confirms no new Pizza Hut stores except to replace closed outlets.

news.title:
Devyani International surges nearly 9% post Q3 results, marking strong performance.
The stock heads for its best trading day since December 2021.
news.summary:
Devyani International surges nearly 9% post Q3 results, marking strong performance.
The stock heads for its best trading day since December 2021.

news.title: Devyani International's Biryani By Kilo has achieved breakeven EBITDA ahead of earlier guidance.
news.summary: Devyani International's Biryani By Kilo has achieved breakeven EBITDA ahead of earlier guidance.

news.title:
Devyani International's Q3 revenues rose 11.3% YoY to ₹14,409 mn.
KFC India revenues grew 5.9%, Pizza Hut fell 6.3%, 95 stores added in Q3.
news.summary:
Devyani International's Q3 revenues rose 11.3% YoY to ₹14,409 mn.
KFC India revenues grew 5.9%, Pizza Hut fell 6.3%, 95 stores added in Q3.

news.title:
Devyani International's CEO Virag Joshi to retire by March 2026; CFO Manish Dawar promoted to CEO from April 2026.
Anupam Kumar appointed as CFO starting April 2026; CTO and General Counsel roles also see new appointments.
news.summary:
Devyani International's CEO Virag Joshi to retire by March 2026; CFO Manish Dawar promoted to CEO from April 2026.
Anupam Kumar appointed as CFO starting April 2026; CTO and General Counsel roles also see new appointments.

news.title:
Devyani International's board approved acquiring an 11.4% stake in Sky Gate for ₹57.5 crore, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary.
The acquisition involves ₹27.5 crore in cash and issuance of ₹30 crore non-convertible redeemable preference shares.
news.summary:
Devyani International's board approved acquiring an 11.4% stake in Sky Gate for ₹57.5 crore, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary.
The acquisition involves ₹27.5 crore in cash and issuance of ₹30 crore non-convertible redeemable preference shares.

news.title:
Devyani Intl's Q3 and 9M FY26 revenue grew to INR 41,746 mn consolidated.
Board approved merger with Sapphire Foods effective April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
Devyani Intl's Q3 and 9M FY26 revenue grew to INR 41,746 mn consolidated.
Board approved merger with Sapphire Foods effective April 1, 2026.

news.title: Devyani International posts Q3 net loss of 104M rupees, up from 5M YOY.
news.summary: Devyani International posts Q3 net loss of 104M rupees, up from 5M YOY.

news.title: Devyani International's Board to meet on 4 Feb 2026 to declare quarterly results.
news.summary: Devyani International's Board to meet on 4 Feb 2026 to declare quarterly results.

news.title:
Devyani International Ltd will host a Q3 & 9M FY2026 results call on Feb 4, 2026 at 2:30 PM IST.
DIL, a leading QSR operator with over 2,000 stores, represents global and indigenous brands like Yum, Costa Coffee, and Vaango.
news.summary:
Devyani International Ltd will host a Q3 & 9M FY2026 results call on Feb 4, 2026 at 2:30 PM IST.
DIL, a leading QSR operator with over 2,000 stores, represents global and indigenous brands like Yum, Costa Coffee, and Vaango.

news.title:
Devyani International and Sapphire Foods merged to form a large F&B platform with approx. 3,000 stores.
The merged entity targets INR 8,000 crore turnover and INR 210-225 crore cost synergies.
news.summary:
Devyani International and Sapphire Foods merged to form a large F&B platform with approx. 3,000 stores.
The merged entity targets INR 8,000 crore turnover and INR 210-225 crore cost synergies.
